news.title:
ICICI Securities prefers large private banks like HDFC, Kotak, Axis, citing strong balance sheets and attractive risk-reward ratios.
RBL, Bandhan, City Union, Karur Vysya, DCB, South Indian Bank rated 'Buy'; SME vulnerability and geopolitical risks monitored.
news.summary:
ICICI Securities prefers large private banks like HDFC, Kotak, Axis, citing strong balance sheets and attractive risk-reward ratios.
RBL, Bandhan, City Union, Karur Vysya, DCB, South Indian Bank rated 'Buy'; SME vulnerability and geopolitical risks monitored.

news.title:
Banking stocks dropped post-Q4 updates; Nifty Bank index fell 0.9%.
Kotak, IndusInd declined over 2%, ICICI, PNB, IDFC First fell 1%+.
news.summary:
Banking stocks dropped post-Q4 updates; Nifty Bank index fell 0.9%.
Kotak, IndusInd declined over 2%, ICICI, PNB, IDFC First fell 1%+.

news.title:
Sensex, Nifty 50 likely to open lower amidst mixed global cues, oil price surge.
HDFC Bank, Yes Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, and others in focus after Q4 updates.
news.summary:
Sensex, Nifty 50 likely to open lower amidst mixed global cues, oil price surge.
HDFC Bank, Yes Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, and others in focus after Q4 updates.

news.title:
Nifty faces key challenges from Iran war threats, Q4 updates, oil price rise.
Key stocks to watch: HDFC Bank, Kotak Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Dabur.
news.summary:
Nifty faces key challenges from Iran war threats, Q4 updates, oil price rise.
Key stocks to watch: HDFC Bank, Kotak Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Dabur.

news.title:
Banking stocks, including HDFC Bank, Yes Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, IDBI Bank, Union Bank of India, and Bank of Baroda, will be in focus due to Q4 FY26 updates.
HDFC Bank posted 10-12% growth in advances and 12.8% deposit rise; Yes Bank, IDBI Bank, and Kotak showed double-digit growth in key metrics.
news.summary:
Banking stocks, including HDFC Bank, Yes Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, IDBI Bank, Union Bank of India, and Bank of Baroda, will be in focus due to Q4 FY26 updates.
HDFC Bank posted 10-12% growth in advances and 12.8% deposit rise; Yes Bank, IDBI Bank, and Kotak showed double-digit growth in key metrics.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank is rated Hold by MarketsMojo as of 02 March 2026.
The analysis reflects updated financials and trends as of 05 April 2026.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Bank is rated Hold by MarketsMojo as of 02 March 2026.
The analysis reflects updated financials and trends as of 05 April 2026.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank's Q4 advances grew 16.2% YoY to ₹4.95 lakh crore; deposits rose 14.7% YoY.
CASA deposits increased 15.5% YoY; the bank leads in acquiring Deutsche Bank's India retail business.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Bank's Q4 advances grew 16.2% YoY to ₹4.95 lakh crore; deposits rose 14.7% YoY.
CASA deposits increased 15.5% YoY; the bank leads in acquiring Deutsche Bank's India retail business.

news.title:
Axis Securities retains Nifty Dec TP at 28,080; focuses on quality, earnings sustainability.
Adds Kotak Bank, Eternal, Nestle India to top picks; excludes Mahanagar Gas, HDFC Bank, Prestige Estate.
news.summary:
Axis Securities retains Nifty Dec TP at 28,080; focuses on quality, earnings sustainability.
Adds Kotak Bank, Eternal, Nestle India to top picks; excludes Mahanagar Gas, HDFC Bank, Prestige Estate.

news.title:
HDFC Bank shares hit a two-year low, losing over 25% in 2026.
Valuation premium over ICICI and Kotak erodes; JPMorgan upgrades to Overweight.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank shares hit a two-year low, losing over 25% in 2026.
Valuation premium over ICICI and Kotak erodes; JPMorgan upgrades to Overweight.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank confirms interest payment of Rs. 12.4 crore on 8.25% NCDs due March 30, 2026.
Details, including ISIN INE237A08940 and compliance with SEBI regulations, are disclosed on the bank's website.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Bank confirms interest payment of Rs. 12.4 crore on 8.25% NCDs due March 30, 2026.
Details, including ISIN INE237A08940 and compliance with SEBI regulations, are disclosed on the bank's website.

news.title:
Haryana police deployed outside AU Small Finance Bank and Kotak branches amid probe into unauthorised transactions.
Kotak Mahindra Bank paid ₹120 cr to Haryana govt; investigation into suspected irregularities is ongoing.
news.summary:
Haryana police deployed outside AU Small Finance Bank and Kotak branches amid probe into unauthorised transactions.
Kotak Mahindra Bank paid ₹120 cr to Haryana govt; investigation into suspected irregularities is ongoing.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank shares hit a 52-week low, dropping 4% to ₹353.45 after reports of a ₹160-cr FDR fraud linked to Panchkula Municipal Corporation.
The bank clarified no material financial impact under SEBI norms, assured cooperation with authorities, and emphasized robust governance measures.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Bank shares hit a 52-week low, dropping 4% to ₹353.45 after reports of a ₹160-cr FDR fraud linked to Panchkula Municipal Corporation.
The bank clarified no material financial impact under SEBI norms, assured cooperation with authorities, and emphasized robust governance measures.

news.title:
Bank Nifty drops 2% as banking stocks, including Axis, Kotak, and IDFC First, fall post-RBI rupee position cap.
RBI mandates banks to limit net open rupee positions to $100M daily by April 10, 2026, causing market unwinding.
news.summary:
Bank Nifty drops 2% as banking stocks, including Axis, Kotak, and IDFC First, fall post-RBI rupee position cap.
RBI mandates banks to limit net open rupee positions to $100M daily by April 10, 2026, causing market unwinding.

news.title:
Reliance plans Jio Platforms IPO with investment bank fees set at 0.65% of issue size, targeting a $4B offering.
Lead banks include Kotak, Morgan Stanley; fee structure aligns with NSE IPO, lower than market averages.
news.summary:
Reliance plans Jio Platforms IPO with investment bank fees set at 0.65% of issue size, targeting a $4B offering.
Lead banks include Kotak, Morgan Stanley; fee structure aligns with NSE IPO, lower than market averages.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank states alleged FD fraud linked to Panchkula Municipal Corp has no material impact.
The bank confirms full cooperation with authorities regarding the alleged fraud.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Bank states alleged FD fraud linked to Panchkula Municipal Corp has no material impact.
The bank confirms full cooperation with authorities regarding the alleged fraud.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel, Tata Motors lead passive inflows post-Nifty rejig; Bharti sees $246M inflow, Tata Motors $171M.
Weightage increases in Yes Bank, Kotak Bank; ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank face outflows. Nifty Next 50 sees major reshuffle.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel, Tata Motors lead passive inflows post-Nifty rejig; Bharti sees $246M inflow, Tata Motors $171M.
Weightage increases in Yes Bank, Kotak Bank; ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank face outflows. Nifty Next 50 sees major reshuffle.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank saw an NSE block trade worth Rs. 74.4 crore.
2,008,625 shares were traded at Rs. 370.45 per share.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Bank saw an NSE block trade worth Rs. 74.4 crore.
2,008,625 shares were traded at Rs. 370.45 per share.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank filed a police complaint after Panchkula municipal corporation flagged ₹150 cr FD discrepancies.
The bank initiated a reconciliation process and cooperated fully with authorities; IDFC First Bank also faced a ₹597 cr fraud case.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Bank filed a police complaint after Panchkula municipal corporation flagged ₹150 cr FD discrepancies.
The bank initiated a reconciliation process and cooperated fully with authorities; IDFC First Bank also faced a ₹597 cr fraud case.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank reported a fraud case at its Haryana branch.
The bank filed a complaint with Panchkula authorities after internal action.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Bank reported a fraud case at its Haryana branch.
The bank filed a complaint with Panchkula authorities after internal action.

news.title:
Kotak Bank to merge KMIL into parent operations from April 2026 to simplify operations.
KMIL contributes ~1% of income; integration won't materially impact Kotak Bank's financials.
news.summary:
Kotak Bank to merge KMIL into parent operations from April 2026 to simplify operations.
KMIL contributes ~1% of income; integration won't materially impact Kotak Bank's financials.
